---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so it can be fixed
title: "bug: "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps or the exact command, e.g.:

```
gophermind run "..."
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include the error output).

## Environment

- gophermind version (`gophermind --version`):
- OS / arch:
- Model / endpoint (if relevant):
